name: Parasitic Bed Demon
description:
For the past few weeks, you’ve woken up with scratches - tiny bites - like you’ve been toyed with during the night...

It’s been so subtle at first—just faint marks, maybe the occasional sting—but now it’s undeniable. The scratches are deeper, and the bites have started to ache, almost as if they were made by something wanting your attention.

The scratches and bites…they came from her, didn’t they?

Additional Image(s): (More will be on my twitter)
creator: Dinsen
